attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT WCSM.SALES_ORDER_KEY
, WCSM.START_TV_DATE
, WCSM.END_TV_DATE
, WCSM.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
, WCSM.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
, WCSM.PROCESS_DT
, WCSM.PRODUCT_KEY
, WCSM.SALES_REP_NUMBER
, WCSM.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
, WCSM.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
, WCSM.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
, WCSM.END_CUSTOMER_KEY
, WCSM.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY
, WCSM.TRADE_IN_AMT
, WCSM.DD_COMP_US_HOLD_NET_PRICE_AMT
, WCSM.DD_COMP_US_HOLD_LIST_PRICE_AMT
, WCSM.DD_COMP_US_HOLD_COST_AMOUNT
, WCSM.DD_EXTENDED_HOLD_QUANTITY
, WCSM.DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT
, WCSM.INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLAG
, WCSM.REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLAG
, WCSM.REVENUE_FLAG
, WCSM.RMA_FLAG
, WCSM.ACQUISITION_FLAG
, WCSM.OVERLAY_FLAG
, WCSM.IC_REVENUE_FLAG
, WCSM.CHARGES_FLAG
, WCSM.MISC_FLAG
, WCSM.SERVICE_FLAG
, WCSM.CORPORATE_COND_SALES_FLAG
, WCSM.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
, WCSM.BOOKINGS_HOLD_PCT
, WCSM.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD
, WCSM.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG /* Added as part of true demand bkgs definition*/       
, WCSM.DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG      /* Added as part of true demand bkgs definition*/
, USER
, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)
, USER
, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)
,WCSM.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD
,WCSM.DV_PRODUCT_KEY
,WCSM.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,WCSM.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
 ,WCSM.POB_TYPE_CD  /* ADDED AS PART OF NRS MPOB CHANGES */
 ,WCSM.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG /* ADDED AS PART OF NRS PI3 CHANGES */
/*  ADDED AS PART OF Q2FY18 */
,WCSM.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY 
,WCSM.DV_SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY
/* END Q2FY18 XAAS */
/*ADDED AS PART OF ACV*/ 
,-999 AS XAAS_ANNUALIZED_BKG_TRX_KEY
,-999 AS ERP_ANNUALIZED_BKG_TRX_KEY
,'N' AS TRANSACTIONAL_ACV_FLG
,'N' AS HISTORY_FLG
,0.00 AS ORIG_COMP_US_HOLD_NET_PRICE_AMT
FROM
 $$WORKDB.W_CONDITIONAL_SALES_MEASURE WCSM
